title: Actor's Words Upset Ballet and Opera Fans
summary: Timothée Chalamet, a famous actor, said something that made many people in ballet and opera upset. He talked about keeping art forms alive and mentioned that no one cares about ballet or opera anymore. He quickly said he respects the people who do these arts. But his words caused a big reaction. Stars from stage shows, opera houses, and ballet companies criticized him. Some people, like Jamie Lee Curtis, asked why artists would say bad things about other artists. Others, like Deepa Johnny, said artists should work together to support all art. The ballet community said ballet is very much alive and many people enjoy it. This shows that words can hurt, and it's important to be kind to everyone's art.

What did the ballet community say about ballet?

background_read: This article is about how words can affect people. Timothée Chalamet is a well-known actor from movies. Ballet and opera are old art forms where people dance or sing in performances. When someone says something negative about art, it can hurt the feelings of those who work hard in it. Artists often support each other, so criticism can cause disagreements. Learning about different arts helps us appreciate everyone's talents.
Article_Structure: WHO: Timothée Chalamet, a famous actor, and people from ballet and opera
WHAT: Chalamet said no one cares about ballet and opera, causing upset
WHERE: This happened during a talk at the University of Texas and online
WHY: To show how words can hurt and the importance of respecting all art forms

perspectives.description: He thinks ballet and opera are not cared about by audiences anymore
They believe all art should be respected and supported together
